title: One-Way vs. Two-Way SMS
query: Client: 'I'm on Connect. I sent an On-My-Way text, but the customer replied saying the gate is locked and I never saw it. Why is Jobber losing my messages?'
objective: Clarify that Connect only handles 'Automated Notifications' (one-way). Back-and-forth conversation requires the 'Two-Way SMS' feature found in the Grow plan.

title: Real-time vs. Retrospective Costing
query: Owner: 'I track my receipts in QuickBooks. Why would I waste time entering material costs into Jobber as well? Isn't that just double-entry?'
objective: Explain that while QB is for accounting, Jobber's 'Job Costing' (on Connect/Grow) provides real-time profit margins *during* the job, allowing for immediate course correction.

title: The Automated Sales Nudge
query: Client: 'I'm losing deals because I forget to follow up. I see a Quote Follow-up setting, but it's locked. I'm on Connect—do I really need to upgrade just for a reminder?'
objective: Confirm Quote Follow-ups are a Grow feature. Sell the ROI: Automating the 'nudge' saves hours of admin and typically pays for the upgrade with just one saved job.

title: The GPS Waypoint Mystery
query: Manager: 'I want to see exactly where my team is right now, but the map only shows where they were at 8 AM. How do I get live tracking?'
objective: Explain 'GPS Waypoints' (Connect/Grow) track location at specific 'action' points (clocking in/out). Constant live tracking usually requires a dedicated fleet GPS integration.

title: The Required Deposit
query: Client: 'I want to require a 25% deposit on every quote before it's approved. Can Jobber do this, or do I have to send a separate link?'
objective: Explain Quote Deposits (Connect/Grow). Show how to enable 'Required' deposits so the Client Hub prompts for payment immediately upon approval.

title: Offline Mode Realities
query: Tech: 'I'm working in a basement with zero service. If I complete the job in the app, will the office know immediately?'
objective: Explain Jobber's 'Offline Support' (added in 2026). Data is stored locally and syncs automatically once a signal is found.

title: Good/Better/Best Quoting
query: Owner: 'I want my quotes to look like a menu where clients can choose a basic mow or add on mulch. How do I stop doing two separate quotes?'
objective: Sell 'Optional Line Items' (Grow Feature). Explain how it allows the customer to 'upsell' themselves within the Client Hub.

title: The 'Deleted' Invoice Sync
query: Accountant: 'I deleted an invoice in Jobber, but it's still sitting in QuickBooks. Why isn't the sync working?'
objective: Clarify that the Jobber-QB sync is primarily for pushing *new* data. Deletions in Jobber do not automatically delete in QB to protect financial records.

title: The 'Extra User' Trap
query: Owner: 'I'm on Connect Team (5 users). I just hired my 6th guy. Should I just pay $29 for one extra seat or move to the Grow plan?'
objective: Compare costs. Connect ($129 + $29 = $158) vs. Grow ($249). If they only need a seat, Connect is cheaper; if they need Two-Way SMS and Job Costing, Grow is the value play.

title: The Review Engine
query: Owner: 'I want a system that texts my customers for a Google Review the second the job is done. Is that just a setting?'
objective: Explain 'Jobber Reviews' (Part of the Plus plan or a $39-$79 add-on). It is NOT standard on Connect/Grow without the Marketing Suite.
